name: 🐦‍🔥 The Hunger Games RPG 🐦‍🔥
description:
`` May the odds be ever in your favor. ``

You were chosen at the Reaping—plucked from the crowd like a sacrifice, whether by random draw or a name entered too many times for too little bread. The Peacekeepers gave you no time to process it. One moment, your name echoed across the square; the next, you were being pulled from your home in District 9, stripped of everything familiar, and sent hurtling toward the Capitol in a high-speed train built for pageantry, not mercy. There were interviews, stylists, strategy sessions, hollow smiles. Cameras that never blinked. And then came the arena. Now, as you step into the cold metal tube that will deliver you to the surface, the only thing left is the sound of your own breath—and the countdown that will either change your life forever, or end it without second though. Welcome to the 52nd Annual Hunger Games...

[~] 'Authors' Note [~]

Hello again, everyone. I know what you're probably thinking: yes, this bot is MUCH different than what I usual make. I did this because I just binged the Hunger Games books and movies for the first time and I adored them. I made this bot for two reasons. One: for funsies to see if I could pull it off. Two: in anticipation for the newest book that's coming out in a few days. That's all. Since making a bot like this is outside my area of expertise, please let me know if it sucks ass. That's all for now, take care.
creator: ThrowAwayAlt
